division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: Notwithstanding Section 9255, any vehicle transferred pursuant to Section 14607.6 shall be subject to a title transfer fee equal to the department’s actual cost of processing that transfer.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 2. Registration Fees [9250 - 9271]
##### § 9255.3

Notwithstanding Section 9255, any vehicle transferred pursuant to Section 14607.6 shall be subject to a title transfer fee equal to the department’s actual cost of processing that transfer.

*(Added by Stats. 1994, Ch. 1133, Sec. 4. Effective January 1, 1995.)*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding Section 9255, any vehicle transferred pursuant to Section 14607.6 shall be subject to a title transfer fee equal to the department’s actual cost of processing that transfer.
